name: poe2-cn-translation
description: Chrome extension that adds Simplified/Traditional Chinese to Path of Exile 2 community sites and the official trade site.

scripts.build: npm run build:dictionary && vite build && node scripts/build-trade-content.mjs
scripts.crawl:poe2db: uv run --with scrapling --with curl-cffi --with playwright --with browserforge python scripts/crawl-poe2db-scrapling.py
